messages.content:
这是我放在 appendix 里面的附录，这个没办法加上 Figure x 的标签。使得我的文字部分没办法引用
  
\begin{figure*}[t]
\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=gray!5!white,colframe=gray!75!black,title=\textbf{Prompt for Data Recipe Generation (Natural Language)}]
\small
\texttt{\# Task Description}\\
\texttt{\{\{ task\_description \}\}}
\texttt{\# Benchmark}\\
\texttt{\#\# \{\{ benchmark.name \}\}}\\
\texttt{\{\{ benchmark.description \}\}}
\texttt{\# Available Hugging Face Training Datasets}\\
\texttt{\{\% for item in datasets -\%\}}\\
\texttt{\#\# \{\{ item.dataset\_id \}\}}\\
\texttt{\{\{ item.examples \}\}}\\
\texttt{\{\% endfor -\%\}}
---
Based on the Task Description, the target Benchmark, and the Available Hugging Face Training Datasets, design a feasible \textbf{Data Processing Plan}. This plan must include:
(1) **Data Selection**: Identify the most suitable raw datasets from the available list.
(2) **Data Processing Workflow**: Define the pipeline to transform selected raw data into high-quality SFT training data.
The plan will serve as a blueprint for code generation and data production. Ensure it is comprehensive, actionable, and free from ambiguous or vague statements.
A high-quality SFT dataset must exhibit the following attributes:
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*]
    \item \textbf{High Quality}: Accurate samples free from noise.
    \item \textbf{Diversity}: Coverage of varied instructions and objectives.
    \item \textbf{Relevance}: Strong alignment with the target vertical domain.
\end{itemize}
\textbf{Important Constraints \& Guidelines:}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*]
    \item \textbf{Source Selection}: strictly select datasets provided in the context. Prioritize those with complete metadata and clear field definitions. \textbf{Strictly prohibit data contamination: DO NOT use benchmark data for training.} Do not hallucinate datasets, splits, or configurations not provided in the context.
    \item \textbf{Grounding}: Base the processing workflow solely on the actual fields and content of the selected datasets. Do not make assumptions about data fields that do not exist.
    \item \textbf{Context}: Ensure inputs and outputs form coherent Q\&A turns. If the output relies on specific context (e.g., a document or snippet) within the data, design the workflow to explicitly embed this context into the input.
    \item \textbf{Format Alignment}: If the benchmark requires specific formats (e.g., multiple-choice, JSON output), ensure the constructed training data aligns with these requirements.
    \item \textbf{Final Output Format}: The pipeline must produce data in the following standard dialogue format:\\
    \texttt{\{"dialogs": [\{"role": "user", "content": "..."\}, \{"role": "assistant", "content": "..."\}]\}}
    \item \textbf{LLM Utilization}: Flexibly leverage LLM inference capabilities for tasks such as: extracting instructions from heterogeneous documents, data augmentation/synthesis, and quality verification. Clearly specify the prompt design strategies for these steps.
\end{itemize}
\textbf{Output Format:}
Generate the plan strictly in the following format (do not include preamble or additional text):
\texttt{\#\# Training Data}\\
\texttt{[}\\
\texttt{    \{"dataset\_id": "target\_id", "split": "target\_split", "name": "config\_name", "sample\_num": "int", "reason": "justification"\},}\\
\texttt{    ...}\\
\texttt{]}
\texttt{\#\# Data Processing Workflow}\\
\texttt{[Detailed Data Processing Workflow description]}
\end{tcolorbox}
\end{figure*}

在 LaTeX 中，`figure` 或 `figure*` 环境本身就是为了处理浮动体和编号设计的。你之所以觉得“没办法加标签”，通常是因为 `tcolorbox` 是一个内容盒子，而 `\caption` 和 `\label` 通常需要放在盒子**外面**（但在 `figure` 环境**内部**）。

以下是三种解决方案，取决于你想要的视觉效果：

### 方案一：标准写法（最推荐）
将 `\caption` 和 `\label` 放在 `\end{tcolorbox}` 之后，`\end{figure*}` 之前。这是最标准的方法，Latex 会自动为你生成 "Figure X: ..." 的编号。

```latex
\begin{figure*}[t]
    % 你的 tcolorbox 内容保持不变
    \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=gray!5!white,colframe=gray!75!black,title=\textbf{Prompt for Data Recipe Generation (Natural Language)}]
        \small
        % ... (你的所有内容) ...
        \texttt{\# Task Description}\\
        % ... (省略中间内容以节省空间) ...
        \texttt{[Detailed Data Processing Workflow description]}
    \end{tcolorbox}
    
    % --- 在这里添加 Caption 和 Label ---
    \caption{The full prompt used for data recipe generation. This prompt is input to the LLM to generate the processing plan.}
    \label{fig:data_recipe_prompt} 
\end{figure*}
```

**如何在正文中引用：**
```latex
As shown in Figure \ref{fig:data_recipe_prompt}, the prompt consists of...
```

---

### 方案二：附录编号修正（如果你指的是编号不正确）
如果你的问题是：“我在附录里，它显示的是 Figure 5，但我想要 Figure A.1”，那么你需要在附录开始的地方重置计数器和命名格式。

在你的 `.tex` 文件的 `\appendix` 之后添加以下代码：

```latex
\appendix
% 重置 figure 计数器
\setcounter{figure}{0} 
% 修改编号格式为 A.1, A.2 等
\renewcommand{\thefigure}{\Alph{section}.\arabic{figure}} 

% 然后再放你的 figure 代码
\begin{figure*}[t]
    \begin{tcolorbox}[...]
      ...
    \end{tcolorbox}
    \caption{Data Recipe Prompt.}
    \label{fig:appendix_prompt}
\end{figure*}
```

---

### 方案三：将 Caption 整合进 tcolorbox（更美观）
如果你希望 "Figure X: ..." 的标题直接显示在那个灰色的标题栏上，而不是在盒子下方，你可以利用 `tcolorbox` 自带的浮动功能（这就**不需要**外面的 `\begin{figure*}` 了）。

你需要使用 `float` 参数：

```latex
% 确保导言区引入了 tcblibrary
% \usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}

% 直接使用 tcolorbox，不要包裹 figure 环境
\begin{tcolorbox}[
    float*=t, % 等同于 figure*[t]
    colback=gray!5!white,
    colframe=gray!75!black,
    % 这里是关键：设置 title 为 caption
    title=\textbf{Prompt for Data Recipe Generation (Natural Language)},
    nameref={fig:data_recipe_prompt}, % 设置引用名称
    label={fig:data_recipe_prompt},   % 设置 label
    every float=\centering
]
    \small
    % ... (你的内容) ...
    \texttt{\# Task Description}\\
    % ...
\end{tcolorbox}
```
*注意：方案三虽然紧凑，但有时会导致 LaTeX 只有在盒子内部生成 "Figure X"，而在下方的标准 Caption 位置没有文字。通常学术论文（如 CVPR/ACL）推荐使用**方案一**，因为格式更符合标准排版要求。*

### 总结建议
直接使用 **方案一**。只要 `\label` 紧跟在 `\caption` 后面，并且它们都在 `figure*` 环境内，你就可以在正文任何地方使用 `\ref{fig:your_label_name}` 进行引用。
